creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Thibault Payet from comment #1)

> By the ways, linux-steam-utils works with rl9 too.
The fact that 32bit programs now also work under rl9 is thanks to fluffy with his commit 7dbd23b9e860[1] :D


[1] https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=7dbd23b9e860c5e2515e0ec243211f0406b5d0df
